query: I'm building a system monitor in Rust with ratatui — a left sidebar of processes and a main panel with live CPU/mem charts. Help me lay it out.
After my ratatui app panics, the terminal is stuck in raw mode and the prompt is invisible. How do I make teardown panic-safe?
Split my ratatui frame into a header, three side-by-side columns, and a footer using Layout and Constraint.
I need a selectable list in ratatui where the highlighted row survives across redraws and j/k move the selection.
Stream LLM tokens from a tokio task into my ratatui chat view without redrawing on every single token.
My ratatui table with Japanese text has misaligned columns — the CJK characters throw off the widths.
Write a TestBackend-based unit test that asserts my ratatui widget renders the right buffer, with no real terminal.
Scaffold the crossterm terminal setup and event loop for a brand-new ratatui app.
Add a confirm/cancel modal popup centered over my existing ratatui layout.
Port this old tui-rs 0.19 code to current ratatui 0.30 — the Layout and Constraint APIs changed.
Draw a Gauge and a Sparkline in ratatui that update every frame from my app state.
My ratatui Scrollbar doesn't move when I scroll the list — the ScrollbarState isn't tracking the offset.
Build a terminal UI in Go using Bubble Tea and Lip Gloss.
I want a Python TUI with Textual — App, widgets, and TCSS layout.
Convert this PNG photo into ASCII art and save it as a text file.
Render an image as colored half-block characters in the terminal in real time.
Make a React component that displays ASCII art on a web page.
Add a progress bar to my non-interactive Rust build script.
Just print a colored, aligned table to stdout in Rust — no interactivity.
Build a web dashboard with charts in React and Tailwind.
Orchestrate several tmux panes for my agent session.
Write a CLAUDE.md documenting build commands for my Rust repo.
Parse command-line flags for my Rust CLI with clap.
Build a desktop GUI app in Rust with egui.
